finalized_plan.description: Use the search_agent to locate the specific Girls Who Code source or article that details the statistic about computer scientists being 37% women initially and then changing by 13 percentage points
Identify within the source the two key years: the starting year when the percentage was 37% and the later year when the percentage changed by 13% (resulting in either 50% or another computed figure)
Extract and verify these years along with any other relevant details that confirm the timeline of the change
Calculate the difference (in years) between the initial and later year
Verify the computed duration by cross-checking against the details in the source to ensure it matches the reported timeline
Provide the final computed number of years as the answer

root_cause_reasoning: The agent did not perform any search and directly generated the answer.
